title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Ramky Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Ramky Group
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!
